CPR-WA.settings.defaultAutofireCost.name: Default Autofire Ammo Cost
CPR-WA.settings.defaultAutofireCost.hint: Rounds consumed by an autofire or suppressive burst when a weapon does not override it. RED default is 10.
CPR-WA.settings.aoeSize.name: Blast Size (tiles)
CPR-WA.settings.aoeSize.hint: Side length, in grid tiles, of the square blast area placed for grenades and rockets. RED default is 3 (a 3x3 area).
CPR-WA.settings.aoeAutoTarget.name: Auto-target Tokens in Blast
CPR-WA.settings.aoeAutoTarget.hint: Automatically set every token inside the placed blast template as your target.
CPR-WA.settings.diwakoAoeDv.name: Area DV Check (diwako)
CPR-WA.settings.diwakoAoeDv.hint: Requires diwako-cpred-additions. When an area weapon is fired, resolve the ranged DV at the distance from the attacker to the blast centre and post a hit/miss result to chat.
CPR-WA.settings.autoLinkInjuries.name: Auto-link Critical Injuries
CPR-WA.settings.autoLinkInjuries.hint: Turn critical-injury names found in item descriptions into clickable compendium links, and reference them on critical damage cards.
CPR-WA.settings.burningMild.name: Mild Burning damage
CPR-WA.settings.burningStrong.name: Strong Burning damage
CPR-WA.settings.burningDeadly.name: Deadly Burning damage
CPR-WA.mixedMag.title: Load Magazine
CPR-WA.mixedMag.dragHint: Drag ammo into slots. Slot 1 fires first. Rearrange freely; confirm to load.
CPR-WA.mixedMag.wrongVariety: This weapon cannot chamber that ammo variety.
CPR-WA.aoe.dvHit: {attacker} hits the area (DV: {dv} at {dist}m, {diff} over)! Roll Damage against targets in the blast!
CPR-WA.aoe.dvMiss: {attacker} misses the area by {diff} (area DV: {dv} at {dist}m)!
